Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", sum(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/9d4d0c0dc3fe90f7eeaebb937edf42c133edc973d2411434ad1bbb11a5861af1/31d2af06-8477-47aa-a223-55284da80561/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
